_comment: circuit-agent configuration for Base chain — edit these values before starting

api._note: Public CIRCUIT API. Self-hosters: change to http://localhost:18960 and set CIRCUIT_INTERNAL_KEY in .env to bypass payment.

strategy._strategy_note: entryBudgetEth: ETH per trade. buyCooldownMinutes: skip re-entry on the same token for this many minutes after closing.

circuit._note: Agent will warn when CIRCUIT balance drops below this (for API payment top-up)

llm._note: provider: 'minimax' (default) or 'ollama' (local). minimaxKey or MINIMAX_API_KEY env var. baseUrl overrides the provider default.

survival._note: Warn when ETH < minEthWarning. Pause new buys when ETH < minEthPause. circuitReinvestPct: fraction of each profit used to buy CIRCUIT (0.25 = 25%).

reflect._note: Self-improvement loop interval (default 4h). autoApply: true = auto-apply suggested config changes within safe bounds.

telegram._note: Set token here OR in TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var. heartbeatChatId = your Telegram user ID to receive heartbeat messages.

heartbeat._note: intervalMs: proactive check-in cadence (default 5 min, 0 to disable). contextRefreshMs: how often to refresh cached ETH price + Fear & Greed index (default 30 min).

swarm._note: autoPublish: emit buy/sell signals automatically on trade execution. minReputationToFollow: only factor signals from agents above this reputation score (0-100). consensusBoostFactor: multiply scan score by this when swarm consensus agrees (e.g. 1.2 = +20% score boost).

agentLoop._note: How often the agent reasons about and updates its session strategy (default 90 min). The LLM sets mode/patternFilter/minScore for the next window. Modes: active (auto-buy best scorer), selective (LLM gate per candidate), watchOnly (scan only, no buys).
